relationships.paper: Collaborative Rational Speech Act: Pragmatic Reasoning for Multi-Turn Dialog
relationships.evidence: To systematically examine these compositional strategies, we analyze subword composition from three key perspectives. First, we examine how the geometry of composed word representations relates to that of their subword constituents. Specifically, we assess whether composed representations maintain linear alignment with their constituent representations, revealing patterns of structural similarity across layers. (Section 1)
